arts.ttl: Sources: Stoke City win race to land former Manchester United hero
arts.sum: Is Mark Robins the man to get Stoke City back to the Premier League?

arts.ttl: When Burnley’s new recruit Oliver Sonne will be available to make Clarets debut after January switch
arts.sum: Burnley’s new recruit Oliver Sonne will face a slight delay before he’s able to make his Clarets debut.

arts.ttl: Burnley sign Peru international Oliver Sonne as Championship club get straight down to business in bid to boost their promotion push
arts.sum: Championship promotion hopefuls Burnley have signed Peru international Oliver Sonne on a four-and-a-half-year deal from Danish Superliga side Silkeborg.

arts.ttl: Mark Robins to Stoke City latest - playing style, strengths and why he left Coventry - Stoke-on-Trent Live
arts.sum: Andy Turner: He’s very much a man manager whose big strength when he was with Coventry, going right back to when he took over with the club in the languishing in League Two, was galvanising the players and fans as one with the mantra ‘rise together,’ regardless of the club’s well documented off-field problems. He was sacked – a decision that was widely condemned by the majority of Sky Blues fans – by club owner Doug King who blamed Robins for dismantling the hugely successful coaching set-up that included assistant manager Adi Viveash who was recognised as a key part of the club’s success and rise up the leagues in recent years.

arts.ttl: Burnley's new signing Oliver Sonne profiled: Famous relative, former model and 'nerd' for coffee and tattoos
arts.sum: A nephew to a world-famous celebrity, a self-proclaimed “nerd” for coffee and drawing tattoos and a former model – Burnley’s new capture appears to be quite the character.

arts.ttl: Burnley confirm capture of their first signing of the January transfer window as full-back pens long-term deal
arts.sum: Burnley have made Peruvian international Oliver Sonne their first signing of the January transfer window.
Aidan Perkins previews the New Year's Day fixtures in the Championship and has a score prediction for all 12 games.

arts.ttl: Ryan Shawcross reveals pre-match advice from Tony Pulis as Stoke City claimed long-awaited win
arts.sum: Ryan Shawcross took a pre-game call from Tony Pulis to run through getting key defensive messages over quickly as a manager – before guiding Stoke City to their first clean sheet in seven games and a first win in 10. Gally probably wasn’t as effective as he has been in previous games but I think it’s a Man Utd thing, a Sir Alex Ferguson thing, that I’d rather go for it and maybe risk losing than to sit in and lose.”

arts.ttl: Oluwaseun Adewumi set for Dundee stay as Burnley green light loan transfer extension
arts.sum: Adewumi has registered two goals and one assist in 11 appearances at Dens Park

arts.ttl: Burnley predicted team to face Stoke City as Scott Parker expected to make tweaks - gallery
arts.sum: Burnley will be hoping to continue their fine form when they kick off the New Year with a home clash against Stoke City.
